# image

**Instance Property**

The thumbnail image of the question.

## Declaration

```swift
var image: UIImage
```

## Inspecting thumbnail data

- **box**: A copy of the box on the page this thumbnail was generated from.
- **pageID**: The ID of the page this thumbnail was generated from.
